why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:registry_data must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a body-consuming registry_data decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for an official DIMENSION_TYPE registry-key fixture with an official empty entry list only and is separate from real registry contents, RegistrySynchronization.packRegistries output, registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_registry_data_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 7, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x07.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: Registries.DIMENSION_TYPE, ClientboundRegistryDataPacket(ResourceKey, List), ClientboundRegistryDataPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundRegistryDataPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundRegistryDataPacket.registry()/entries().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound registry_data dispatch/decode.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains reset_chat id 0x06, but not registry_data id 0x07.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x7 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound registry_data packet id 7
